summary:
9 changed file(s) on feat/foreman-hardening

Prior round:
- implement: claude completed successfully
- validation: [deterministic] all deterministic checks passed for engineering-vllm-inference-blueprint | [judge] [fallback from codex] All nine stated success criteria are met. cargo check/clippy/fmt/test all pass clean (32 tests, zero warnings). Config-driven vLLM endpoint via OnceLock, stderr draining via tokio BufReader, semaphore concurrency limiting, and CI workflow are all correctly implemented. Prior round's six findings (identity check, overcharge, error propagation, streaming rejection, billing cost tests, tampered signature tests) are resolved. Three low-severity observations remain but are architectural design choices, not code defects blocking deployment.
- finding: spend_auth.amount parsed as u64 with silent fallback to 0
- finding: reqwest::Client allocated per on-chain job invocation
- finding: Billing is opt-in at HTTP layer — no spend_auth means free inference
